description: Kubernetes, Cosmos DB, and AI metrics for Orleans applications

panels.description: CPU usage as percentage of requested CPU. >100% means pods use more than requested — scheduling pressure.
panels.title: CPU Pressure (Usage / Request %)

panels.description: Percentage of provisioned throughput consumed. >80% = near throttling. 100% = requests being rate-limited (429s).
panels.title: Normalized RU Consumption %
